multiplicity_rule: All component genes reported; within-signature/window FDR supplied for inferential summaries
robustness_checks: Exact reconstruction; primary-independent meta; leave-one-dataset-out; development-overlap exclusion
interpretation_note: No gene selected for entry based on significance

multiplicity_rule: BH-FDR separately by T24/T48 and pathway tier
robustness_checks: Prediction intervals; leave-one-dataset-out; singscore versus ssGSEA
interpretation_note: No prespecified primary pathway reached FDR<0.05 for its overall mean change

multiplicity_rule: BH-FDR by analysis set, time window and tier
robustness_checks: Independent-only cohorts; prediction intervals; ssGSEA sensitivity
interpretation_note: One primary T48 coupling passed FDR: SIG034–oxidative phosphorylation

robustness_checks: HPA exact/alias mapping; PBMC-atlas scope check; unresolved genes retained

multiplicity_rule: No testing because the availability gate failed
robustness_checks: Static severity and fixed outcomes explicitly rejected as substitutes
interpretation_note: Zero clinical association P values generated
Extended windows do not alter primary interpretation

multiplicity_rule: Stage 3 baseline-SD primary; MAD and raw/rank sensitivity retained
interpretation_note: Stage 4 contributions inherit the frozen denominator
High heterogeneity is retained in interpretation

robustness_checks: Dominant-gene identity across cohorts; all genes retained
interpretation_note: Dominance is descriptive, not a basis for dropping signatures
